'''Photon spiders''' were bioluminescent [[Crystal/Legends|crystalline]] predators native to [[Varl/Legends|Varl]]. They survived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] despite the desolation which caused its abandonment by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] and [[t'landa Til]]. They required no air to survive, and lived on veins of [[Aurodium/Legends|aurodium]].<ref name="LoNH" />
